LanguageData.VSIE_MovieNight.label: holotape night
LanguageData.VSIE_MovieNight.letterText: {ORGANIZER_labelShort} is kicking back with {COMPANION_labelShort} for a holotape night.
LanguageData.VSIE_BuildingSnowmen.label: building snow brahmins
LanguageData.VSIE_GrabbingBeer.label: grabbing booze
LanguageData.VSIE_GrabbingBeer.calledOffMessage: The booze by the fire have been called off.
LanguageData.VSIE_GrabbingBeer.finishedMessage: The booze by the fire have finished.
LanguageData.VSIE_BingeParty.label: camp blowout
LanguageData.VSIE_BingeParty.letterText: {ORGANIZER_labelShort} is calling for a camp blowout. Colonists will cut loose with food, booze, and chems for a few hours unless you draft them away.
